source_note: All rows are small-scale Work4 AIR-VLA D0 engineering diagnostics. They are not AIR-VLA+ reproduction or paper-level performance claims.

iterations.label: ef_resmove
iterations.hypothesis: Target-conditioned residual movement should improve short-horizon UAV approach.
iterations.mechanism_source: A/B/C 2-episode gate and 20-episode A comparison
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory
iterations.decision: retain as stable movement baseline
iterations.boundary: no arm signal and no completion signal

iterations.label: phase_hybrid_early_close
iterations.hypothesis: Early phase closure and arm hold should expose manipulation-side signal.
iterations.mechanism_source: A/B/C 2-episode gate showed B needed close timing inside the 20-step cap
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory
iterations.decision: retain as arm diagnostic, not standalone method
iterations.boundary: no UAV signal and no completion signal

iterations.label: mini_dual_head
iterations.hypothesis: Movement smoothing and replay stitching may stabilize action chunks.
iterations.mechanism_source: A/B/C initial candidate set
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory
iterations.decision: hold unless redesigned
iterations.boundary: safety-only result

iterations.label: ef_resmove_phase
iterations.hypothesis: Movement residual and phase control are complementary and should increase total engineering score.
iterations.mechanism_source: A had UAV signal and B had arm signal under separate gates
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory
iterations.decision: promote to state-gated repair branch
iterations.boundary: no completion signal and first episode loses UAV signal

iterations.label: ef_resmove_phase_first_attempt
iterations.hypothesis: The same A+B policy should run through the evaluator.
iterations.mechanism_source: First A+B 2-episode attempt
iterations.media_status: no media because evaluator crashed before episode output
iterations.decision: retain as evaluator runtime warning
iterations.boundary: not an algorithm score

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed005
iterations.hypothesis: Closing only after the estimated UAV-target distance enters the evaluator scoring band should remove premature action frames while preserving arm signal.
iterations.mechanism_source: Evaluator scoring code marks action frames only when gripper state changes inside the 0.5 to 0.8 m UAV-target band.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: promote to 20-episode stability check
iterations.boundary: no completion signal at speed 0.05

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed005
iterations.hypothesis: The D1 gain should persist beyond the 5-episode gate.
iterations.mechanism_source: D1 5-episode result restored UAV and arm signals relative to AB timed close.
iterations.media_status: 20 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: retain as stable non-completion baseline for state-gated close
iterations.boundary: strong total score but still no completion

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_nohold_speed005
iterations.hypothesis: Removing request-state arm hold tests whether D1 gains come from the state gate or from holding evaluator-reported arm state.
iterations.mechanism_source: D1 combines gated close and request-state arm hold after close.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: do not treat request-state hold as the main source of gain
iterations.boundary: slightly lower total and no completion

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: A slower state-gated approach may align object interaction better than D1 speed 0.05.
iterations.mechanism_source: Local gate simulation showed speed 0.04 delays close after six suppressed frames and six gated close frames.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: promote because one episode reached completion and total score 95
iterations.boundary: high variance across episodes

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: The D3 completion event should be tested over 20 episodes before any stronger claim.
iterations.mechanism_source: D3 5-episode gate produced a completion episode whereas D1 did not.
iterations.media_status: 20 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: promote the speed 0.04 gated branch as the next algorithm-design seed
iterations.boundary: only 1 of 20 episodes completed, so it is not a robust success claim

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_transfer_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: Anchoring hold, lift, transfer, and release to the actual gated close event should repair sparse D3 placement failures.
iterations.mechanism_source: D3 produced only one completed episode in 20 runs, and code inspection showed post-close phases were previously tied to configured close_start_step rather than the real gated close start.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; original clips are 2 s, and homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop.
iterations.decision: do not promote; container-offset transfer lowered UAV score and did not improve completion
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; it verifies gate-relative phase anchoring but rejects this aggressive transfer target

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_lift_standoff_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: Removing D4 container offset while keeping actual-close anchoring and a small lift should preserve D3 approach quality and improve placement completion.
iterations.mechanism_source: D4 rejected aggressive container-offset transfer, so D5 keeps the real gated close anchor but returns transfer_base_mode to standoff with only small post-close lift.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; original clips are 2 s, and homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop.
iterations.decision: promote to 20-episode stability check before any paper-level claim
iterations.boundary: positive 5-episode diagnostic with 3 of 5 completions, but first and fifth episodes fail, so robustness is not established

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_lift_standoff_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: D5 should remain above D3 over a 20-episode stability gate if gate-relative lift-standoff repair is robust enough for the next design stage.
iterations.mechanism_source: D5 5-episode run improved total and completion after removing D4's aggressive container-offset transfer.
iterations.media_status: 20 evaluator videos synchronized locally; homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop from episode 2.
iterations.decision: retain as current best small-scale engineering candidate and use periodic failures to design D6
iterations.boundary: 15 of 20 episodes completed, but episodes 1, 5, 9, 13, and 17 still fail, so this is not a paper-level robust performance claim

iterations.label: D6 post-release guard2 speed004 5ep
iterations.hypothesis: A short post-release guard may prevent the D5 periodic object escape without changing the D5 gate and lift mechanism.
iterations.mechanism_source: D5-20 diagnostics showed repeated object escape after opening in episodes 5, 9, 13, and 17.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop.
iterations.decision: reject post-release base freeze because it drops completion to zero and lowers total score
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; useful for mechanism exclusion only

iterations.label: D7 release22 speed004 5ep
iterations.hypothesis: Keeping the grasp closed for four extra action steps may stabilize the object before opening.
iterations.mechanism_source: D6 showed that freezing after opening is too strong, so D7 tests a pre-open timing change only.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop.
iterations.decision: reject simple release delay because it destroys the D5 approach score and keeps completion at zero
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; useful for excluding release-delay-only repair

iterations.label: D8 reset-normalized D5 timing 5ep
iterations.hypothesis: Normalizing robot actuation state after the final object reset may remove the periodic D5 failure without changing D5 policy timing.
iterations.mechanism_source: D5-20 failures repeated every four episodes, while D6 post-open freeze and D7 release delay both destroyed the D5 success path.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop from episode 2.
iterations.decision: reject reset-state normalization because it collapses UAV score to zero and gives no completion
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; useful for excluding evaluator reset normalization as the next repair direction

iterations.label: D9 close 0.55-0.75 D5 timing 5ep
iterations.hypothesis: Changing close gate bounds around the D5 policy may recover near-threshold misses without changing release, lift, or standoff transfer.
iterations.mechanism_source: D8 rejected reset-state normalization. D9 returns to D5 timing and changes only close gate bounds.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop for the best D9 variant only.
iterations.decision: reject because completion remains zero and UAV score collapses after episode 1
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; no AIR-VLA+ reproduction, official training, learned-policy, robust completion, hardware, sim-to-real, or paper-level performance claim

iterations.label: D9 close 0.50-0.70 D5 timing 5ep
iterations.role: best close-window ablation but still negative
iterations.hypothesis: Changing close gate bounds around the D5 policy may recover near-threshold misses without changing release, lift, or standoff transfer.
iterations.mechanism_source: D8 rejected reset-state normalization. D9 returns to D5 timing and changes only close gate bounds.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop for the best D9 variant only.
iterations.decision: reject as a promoted branch because no episode completes and total remains below D5 and D3
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; no AIR-VLA+ reproduction, official training, learned-policy, robust completion, hardware, sim-to-real, or paper-level performance claim

iterations.label: D9 close 0.45-0.75 D5 timing 5ep
iterations.hypothesis: Changing close gate bounds around the D5 policy may recover near-threshold misses without changing release, lift, or standoff transfer.
iterations.mechanism_source: D8 rejected reset-state normalization. D9 returns to D5 timing and changes only close gate bounds.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop for the best D9 variant only.
iterations.decision: reject because it matches the D9 0.55-0.75 failure pattern
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; no AIR-VLA+ reproduction, official training, learned-policy, robust completion, hardware, sim-to-real, or paper-level performance claim

iterations.label: online feedback field audit
iterations.hypothesis: D9 showed that close-window tuning cannot recover completion. The next repair should verify whether object-relative release or contact-state feedback is available online before another server rollout.
iterations.mechanism_source: Static analysis of the static-support evaluator request payload plus D5 success, D5 failure, and D9 best-row diagnostic JSON files.
iterations.media_status: No remote media because D10 stops at the local field gate.
iterations.decision: do not launch an online object-feedback policy until the evaluator request payload exposes object or contact fields
iterations.boundary: The evaluator writes object geometry into rollout diagnostics, but the policy request contains only images, prompt, and robot state. This is a no-go for a new online object-feedback policy without a payload-extension smoke test.

next_queue.label: online feedback field audit completed
next_queue.hypothesis: The current evaluator request does not expose object or contact feedback to the policy server.
next_queue.planned_ablation: Do not run another timing sweep. Treat D10 as a field-gate result and design a request-payload extension before any online object-feedback rollout.

next_queue.label: evaluator request payload extension smoke
next_queue.hypothesis: A legal evaluator-side request extension should pass object pose, container pose, end-effector pose, UAV pose, gripper state, and task phase to the policy server without changing score calculation.
next_queue.planned_ablation: Write tests for payload schema and a one-episode smoke or 5-episode gate only after the payload extension is verified locally.

media.caption: Timed A+B branch. It keeps arm signal but does not complete.
State-gated close at speed 0.05. It restores UAV and arm scores.
Slower state gate at speed 0.04. This is the only completed diagnostic episode in the 20-episode D3 set.
Gate-relative transfer branch. It proves the close anchor mechanism but lowers score, so it becomes a negative placement-repair ablation.
Gate-relative lift-standoff branch. It removes D4 container offset and gives the strongest current 5-episode completion signal.
D5 20-episode stability check. The run completed 15 of 20 episodes, while a periodic failure pattern remains for D6.
D6 post-release guard. It removes the far object escape but collapses the D5 success path, so it is rejected.
D7 release delay. It improves arm score slightly but loses UAV score entirely, so it is rejected.
D8 reset-state normalization. It preserves D5 timing but collapses UAV score and gives no completion, so it is rejected.
D9 best close-window row. It keeps UAV and arm scores near 37 total but gives no completion, so it is not promoted.
